---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behaviour.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Provide `values.yaml`**
Please provide a copy of your `values.yaml` used to deploy the chart. Remember to censor any sensitive values.

**Provide relevant logs**
Please provide relevant logs, i.e. `kubectl logs POD_NAME -n NAMESPACE` and `kubectl describe POD_NAME -n NAMESPACE`.

**Matrix deployment:**
i.e. ESS Community (incl. Version)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
